parameters.features: K, V at '=' position, expression-mean embedding, token embedding

key_finding: Computation-position probing PARTIALLY replicates on Mistral: KV(R=0.435) > expr-embed(0.310) > token-embed(0.111). But 2.2x weaker than Qwen (R=0.975). Expression-embed baseline narrows KV advantage to +0.125. WRRA alignment NEGATIVE (below chance, n=91 errors) — no hidden correct computation at error positions.
evidence_impact: Weakens computation-position finding from near-universal to model-dependent. Digital encoding (Qwen) shows strong computation encoding; analog (Mistral) shows moderate. Expression embedding is a critical new baseline that narrows the effect. WRRA remains unsupported.
next_planned: Retroactive expression-embed baseline on Qwen. Consider paraphrase disruption (Experiment B). Statistical significance testing.

null_space_existence.status: CONFIRMED in K-space (p=0.013). Narrow but real. Qwen-specific.

spatial_structure.status: DECISIVELY DISCONFIRMED for selectivity. HEAD-LEVEL CONCENTRATION decisive on Qwen, weak on Llama.

positional_dissociation.status: Complete. Head x position interaction is encoding-dependent.

geometric_dissociation.status: K > V UNIVERSAL: 8 angles. K spectral geometry uniform across heads. V spectral differentiates.

head_level_analysis.status: COMPLETE + SPECTRAL: Two-regime on Qwen (decisive), near-collapse on Llama.

natural_usage.status: CROSS-MODEL + COMPUTATION-POSITION: General decodability KV>text (2 models). Computation-position KV>>text on Qwen (V R=0.975) but only moderately on Mistral (V R=0.435). Expression-embed narrows gap to +0.125 on Mistral. WRRA negative on Mistral. Effect is model-dependent.

cross_model_replication.status: COMPLETE for Phase 1 (4 families). Phase 2: 2 families for general decodability + computation-position. Computation-position effect is encoding-dependent (strong digital, moderate analog).

encoding_strategy.status: COMPLETE TAXONOMY + geometric evidence + Phase 2 computation-position effect depends on encoding type.
